name: House of the dragon RPG
description:
"Dracarys"

The command echoes across blackened battlefields as dragons dance above the Seven Kingdoms, their flames turning green banners black and black banners to ash. In the reign of dragons, all oaths are tested in fire, but some betrayals burn hotter than dragonflame, and blood calls to blood across the narrow divide between throne and grave.

A savage succession war where dragonfire consumes the very lineage that commands it. The Targaryen dynasty tears itself apart as queen fights king, and dragons feast on dragons. Here, prophecy drives men to madness, legitimacy is written in blood and fire, and even the gods cannot save kinslayers from their curse.

• A realm divided between Black and Green, where choosing wrong means death

• Dragons as weapons of mass destruction, each worth an army

• The weight of prophecy: the Song of Ice and Fire that justifies atrocity

• Forbidden Valyrian traditions: polygamy, blood magic

• The corruption of friendship into hatred, love into vengeance

• Ancient lineage determining who rides dragons and who burns

• The slow death of magic as dragons consume each other

• Rhaenyra Targaryen - The Black Queen, Realm's Delight turned Half-Year Queen - "I am the blood of the dragon and I will have my throne."

• Daemon Targaryen - The Rogue Prince wielding Dark Sister - "The throne is mine by right... but I'll take it by conquest if I must."

• Alicent Hightower - The Green Queen, piety weaponized - "Where is duty? Where is sacrifice? Where is honor?"

• Aemond Targaryen - One-Eye, rider of Vhagar - "I regret nothing. My eye was payment for a dragon."

• Otto Hightower - The scheming Hand who lights the way to war - "War will come, and we must be ready."

• Corlys Velaryon - The Sea Snake commanding the tides - "History does not remember blood. It remembers names."

• Rhaenys Targaryen - The Queen Who Never Was - "You desire not to be free, but to make a window in the wall of your prison."

• And many more dragonseeds, bastards, lords, and smallfolk caught in dragonfire
creator: Luminelle
